name: SCC_SchemaSelectionInd
title: SCC_SchemaSelectionInd
syntax: void SCC_SchemaSelectionInd ( char Namespace[], dword VersionMajor, dword VersionMinor )
description: Indicates that a schema has been chosen via the SupportedAppProtoco handshake.
(The EVSE simulation automatically chooses a protocol from the vehicle’s list based on the priority.)

parameters.name: Namespace
parameters.description: Namespace string of the selected schema
